name: garden-of-forking-paths
description: A rule-driven interactive narrative with a bounded GPT-5.6 personalized epilogue.

scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:runtime && npm run test:prologue && npm run test:flow && npm run test:epilogue && npm run test:release
scripts.test:syntax: find js api tests -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
